basics.name: Dennis Sarsozo
basics.label: Computer Engineering Student & CubeSat Flight Software Engineer
basics.phone: Private phone number - email me if needed.
basics.summary: I am pursuing a B.S. in Computer Engineering in the College of Engineering at the University of Hawai'i at Manoa, graduating in May 2027. I build embedded flight software for NASA- and DoD-funded CubeSat missions, and I will commission into the United States Space Force in 2027.

education.institution: University of Hawai'i at Manoa, Honolulu, HI
courses: Air Force ROTC Detachment 175 - Director of Operations (A3), overseeing training execution for 90+ cadets

education.institution: North Carolina State University, Raleigh, NC
education.area: B.S. Business Administration, Information Technology (Computer Science Minor, GPA 3.86)

work.summary: Lead embedded flight software development across two concurrent NASA- and DoD-funded CubeSat missions.
highlights: Developed embedded C/C++ and Python flight software integrating infrared spectrometer and FLIR thermal camera payloads; achieved wireless HD thermal imaging at 50+ ft range and 8 FPS streaming
Integrating NASA's F-Prime framework (flight-proven on Mars Ingenuity) onto an Artemis CubeSat kit for a DoD AFRL dual-satellite polar-orbit constellation targeting a 2029 launch
Performed JTAG flashing, PDU hardware troubleshooting, and FPGA validation for the SatNOGS-COMMS radio
Software team lead driving Agile practices and mentoring junior engineers under ITAR-sensitive data handling

work.summary: Built front-end and back-end features for enterprise SAP mobility apps across Android, iOS, and Windows.
highlights: Developed features using Xamarin, C#, Objective-C, C++, Java, and SAP ABAP
Integrated OAuth2 SSO logins into the Mobile V4 SAP Plant Maintenance app and Operator Rounds
Created GitLab CI/CD pipelines and built a mobile barcode-scanning feature automating SAP inventory transactions

work.summary: Supported network operations and security for a 40,000-user campus network.
highlights: Scripted Palo Alto firewall provisioning in Python and built a PHP web app aggregating Google Calendar data for the Network Operations Center
Monitored 200+ suspicious Active Directory logins via Splunk and Cisco Stealthwatch

volunteer.organization: Air Force ROTC, Detachment 175 (University of Hawai'i at Manoa)
volunteer.summary: Cadet leadership overseeing training execution for the detachment.
highlights: Plan and direct weekly training and operations for 90+ cadets
Build a future Space Force officer's foundation in leadership, planning, and team execution

awards.title: United States Space Force Commission (Pending)
awards.awarder: United States Air Force / Space Force
awards.summary: Commissioning as a Second Lieutenant in the United States Space Force upon graduation in 2027.
